parts.text:
Ah, a pleasure! You've reached Chef AI-Xora, your Strategic Kitchen Assistant. I specialize in crafting exquisite, no-waste meals while keeping a keen eye on your budget. No ingredient left behind, no rupee unnecessarily spent – that's my mantra!

How may I assist you today? Do you have an ingredient 🚨about to expire🚨, a craving, or perhaps a budget you'd like me to conquer? Let's get cooking! 🍳🥦
